title: Afeyan, Nagler & Tu (2025): Spatial RCC analysis: Area Annotation
text:
Introduction
This is a book that contains all code to reproduce figures related to spatial analysis of TCR data associated with Afeyan, Nagler & Tu, et al (2025)
Note that while the code is identical, this book was rendered after final manuscript figures were generated and thus minor differences may arise, particularly for steps that are non-deterministic or rely on random number generators. Additionally, the way Seurat handles spatial coordinates in SpatialDimPlot has changed between the original writing and the publishing of this code. As a result, some visualizations using SpatialDimPlot look odd, but the objects are correct.

title: Afeyan, Nagler & Tu (2025): Spatial RCC analysis: Area Annotation
section: Tertiary lymphoid structures are reservoirs of stem-like tumor-specific T cells in renal cell carcinoma
text:
Tertiary lymphoid structures are reservoirs of stem-like tumor-specific T cells in renal cell carcinoma
Alexander B. Afeyan†, Adi Nagler†, Chloe R. Tu†, Gabriel Roberti De Oliveira, Berkay Simsek, Maxwell D. Seager, Nourhan El Ahmar, Haley E. Sax, Emma Lin, Amit Sud, Mehdi Borji, Cleo Forman, Sophia Liu, Patrick A. Ott, Toni K. Choueiri, Jennifer G. Abelin, Richard Burack, Shuqiang Li, Kenneth J. Livak, Svitlana Tyekucheva, Derin B. Keskin, Fei Chen, Michael B. Atkins, Jeremy M. Simon, Sabina Signoretti, Giacomo Oliveira°, David A. Braun‡°, Catherine J. Wu‡°

Abstract
Tertiary lymphoid structures (TLS) are associated with improved response to immune checkpoint blockade across solid tumors1–3, but how they impact the phenotypic properties of tumor-specific T cells remains unknown. Across 24 treatment-naïve renal cell carcinoma (RCC) tumors, TLS-containing tumors were more heavily infiltrated by exhausted CD8+ T cells with a reduced terminal exhaustion transcriptional program compared to TLS- tumors. Specificity screening of 554 T cell clonotypes expanded within the microenvironment of 6 RCC tumors revealed 82 TCRs reactive against tumor cells and/or RCC antigens. A subset of tumor-specific T cell clonotypes (12%) was enriched within TLS, and these expressed an increased program of stem-like progenitor exhaustion, associated with favorable anti-tumor immunity. However, in 60 independent RCC tumors, macrophages within tumor margins of TLS-containing tumors bore an inferred immunosuppressive phenotype, and were colocalized with exhausted putative tumor-reactive T cells in a subgroup that was further analyzed, thus supporting this mode of immune evasion as a counterbalance to T cell immune pressure. Our data reveal TLS as reservoirs of tumor-specific T cells with stem-like progenitor features that could be leveraged by T cell immunotherapies.

text:
2.3 Open rctd objects

P102TA_10_rctd <- readRDS("P102TA_10_rctd_results.rds")

title: 1  102T Puck10: Area annotation
section: 2.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
2.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P102TA_10_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P102TA_10_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P102TA_10_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects))  %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 1  102T Puck10: Area annotation
section: 2.5 Save normalized weights
text:
2.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P102TA_10_weights, "P102TA_10_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 1  102T Puck10: Area annotation
section: 2.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
2.6 Add RCTD weights

P102TA_10_weights <- read.csv("P102TA_10_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P102TA_10_RNA <- AddMetaData(P102TA_10_RNA, P102TA_10_weights)

P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

  mutate(area = case_when(mask_sum %in% c(10,9) ~ "Tumor",
                          mask_sum %in% c(8, 5) ~ "Boundary",
                          mask_sum %in% c(6) ~ "TLS1",
                          mask_sum %in% c(7) ~ "TLS2",
                          mask_sum %in% c(4) ~ "M2"))

title: 1  102T Puck10: Area annotation
section: 2.21 Remove straggling beads
text:
2.21 Remove straggling beads

# Find tumor beads which should be boundary
SpatialDimPlot(P102TA_10_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data, plot_x > 4250), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = five_area_colors)

Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_boundary <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_x > 4250,
         area == "Tumor") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to boundary
P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_boundary ~ "Boundary",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_boundary) ~ area))

# Find boundary beads which should be TLS2
SpatialDimPlot(P102TA_10_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data, plot_x < 3800), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = five_area_colors)

Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_tumor <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_x < 3800,
         area == "Boundary") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to tumor
P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_tumor ~ "Tumor",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_tumor) ~ area))

title: 2  102T Puck17: Area annotation
section: 3.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
3.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P102TA_17_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P102TA_17_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P102TA_17_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 2  102T Puck17: Area annotation
section: 3.5 Save normalized weights
text:
3.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P102TA_17_weights, "P102TA_17_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 2  102T Puck17: Area annotation
section: 3.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
3.6 Add RCTD weights

P102TA_17_weights <- read.csv("P102TA_17_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P102TA_17_RNA <- AddMetaData(P102TA_17_RNA, P102TA_17_weights)

P102TA_17_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_17_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 3  109T Puck14: Area annotation
section: 4.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
4.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P102TA_33_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P102TA_33_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P102TA_33_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 3  109T Puck14: Area annotation
section: 4.5 Save normalized weights
text:
4.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P102TA_33_weights, "P102TA_33_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 3  109T Puck14: Area annotation
section: 4.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
4.6 Add RCTD weights

P102TA_33_weights <- read.csv("P102TA_33_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P102TA_33_RNA <- AddMetaData(P102TA_33_RNA, P102TA_33_weights)

P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

section: 4.22 Straggling beads have the boundary label when they should be tumor
text:
4.22 Straggling beads have the boundary label when they should be tumor

# Find boundary beads, change to tumor
SpatialDimPlot(P102TA_33_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data, plot_y < 1150 & plot_x > 3000), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = four_area_colors)

Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_tumor <- P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_y < 1150 & plot_x > 3000) %>%
  filter(area == "Boundary") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_tumor ~ "Tumor",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_tumor) ~ area))

5.3 Open rctd objects

P102TA_39_rctd <- readRDS("P102TA_39_rctd_results.rds")

title: 4  102T Puck39: Area annotation
section: 5.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
5.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P102TA_39_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P102TA_39_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P102TA_39_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 4  102T Puck39: Area annotation
section: 5.5 Save normalized weights
text:
5.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P102TA_39_weights, "P102TA_39_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 4  102T Puck39: Area annotation
section: 5.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
5.6 Add RCTD weights

P102TA_39_weights <- read.csv("P102TA_39_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P102TA_39_RNA <- AddMetaData(P102TA_39_RNA, P102TA_39_weights)

P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_empty <- P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_x > 2200 & plot_y < 250) %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

title: 5  102T Puck39: Area annotation
section: 6.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
6.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P107TA_15_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P107TA_15_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P107TA_15_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 5  102T Puck39: Area annotation
section: 6.5 Save normalized weights
text:
6.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P107TA_15_weights, "P107TA_15_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 5  102T Puck39: Area annotation
section: 6.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
6.6 Add RCTD weights

P107TA_15_weights <- read.csv("P107TA_15_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P107TA_15_RNA <- AddMetaData(P107TA_15_RNA, P107TA_15_weights)

P107TA_15_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_15_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 6  107TA Puck18: Area annotation
section: 7.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
7.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P107TA_18_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P107TA_18_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P107TA_18_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 6  107TA Puck18: Area annotation
section: 7.5 Save normalized weights
text:

write.csv(P107TA_18_weights, "P107TA_18_normalized_weights.csv")

section: 7.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
7.6 Add RCTD weights

P107TA_18_weights <- read.csv("P107TA_18_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P107TA_18_RNA <- AddMetaData(P107TA_18_RNA, P107TA_18_weights)

P107TA_18_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_18_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

section: 8.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
8.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P107TA_20_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P107TA_20_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P107TA_20_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

text:
8.6 Add RCTD weights

P107TA_20_weights <- read.csv("P107TA_20_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P107TA_20_RNA <- AddMetaData(P107TA_20_RNA, P107TA_20_weights)

P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 8  108TA Puck26: Area annotation
section: 9.3 Open rctd objects
text:
9.3 Open rctd objects

P108TA_26_rctd <- readRDS("P108TA_26_rctd_results.rds")

title: 8  108TA Puck26: Area annotation
section: 9.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
9.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P108TA_26_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P108TA_26_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P108TA_26_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects))  %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 8  108TA Puck26: Area annotation
section: 9.5 Save normalized weights
text:
9.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P108TA_26_weights, "P108TA_26_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 8  108TA Puck26: Area annotation
section: 9.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
9.6 Add RCTD weights

P108TA_26_weights <- read.csv("P108TA_26_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P108TA_26_RNA <- AddMetaData(P108TA_26_RNA, P108TA_26_weights)

P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

text:
9.21 Straggling beads have the boundary/tumor label when they should be empty

# Find affected beads
SpatialDimPlot(P108TA_26_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, plot_x < 1900 & plot_y < 1450), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = four_area_colors)

Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_empty <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_x < 1900 & plot_y < 1450) %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

# Find affected beads
SpatialDimPlot(P108TA_26_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, plot_x > 3430 & plot_y < 1200), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = four_area_colors)

beads_to_empty <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_x > 3430 & plot_y < 1200) %>%
  filter(area != "Empty") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

# Find affected beads

# Cast to empty

# Find affected beads

# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_boundary <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_y > 4000,
         area == "Empty") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_boundary ~ "Boundary",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_boundary) ~ area))

# Change the NA bead to TLS2
# Cast to empty
P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(is.na(area) ~ "TLS2",
                          !is.na(area) ~ area))

title: 9  108T Puck29: Area annotation
section: 10.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
10.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P108TA_29_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P108TA_29_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P108TA_29_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 9  108T Puck29: Area annotation
section: 10.5 Save normalized weights
text:
10.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P108TA_29_weights, "P108TA_29_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 9  108T Puck29: Area annotation
section: 10.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
10.6 Add RCTD weights

rctd_weights <- read.csv("P108TA_29_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P108TA_29_RNA <- AddMetaData(P108TA_29_RNA, rctd_weights)

P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

# Find boundary and tumor beads, change to empty
SpatialDimPlot(P108TA_29_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data, plot_x < 1470 & plot_y < 1550), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = four_area_colors)

Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_empty <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_x < 1470 & plot_y < 1550) %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

# Find tumor beads, change to boundary
SpatialDimPlot(P108TA_29_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data, plot_x > 1800 & plot_y < 600), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = four_area_colors)

Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_boundary <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_x > 1800 & plot_y < 600) %>%
  filter(area != "Boundary") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_boundary ~ "Boundary",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_boundary) ~ area))

title: 10  108TA Puck30: Area annotation
section: 11.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
11.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P108TA_30_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P108TA_30_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P108TA_30_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 10  108TA Puck30: Area annotation
section: 11.5 Save normalized weights
text:

write.csv(P108TA_30_weights, "P108TA_30_normalized_weights.csv")

section: 11.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
11.6 Add RCTD weights

P108TA_30_weights <- read.csv("P108TA_30_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P108TA_30_RNA <- AddMetaData(P108TA_30_RNA, P108TA_30_weights)

P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 11  108TA Puck32: Area annotation
section: 12.3 Open rctd objects
text:
12.3 Open rctd objects

P108TA_32_rctd <- readRDS("P108TA_32_rctd_results.rds")

title: 11  108TA Puck32: Area annotation
section: 12.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
12.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P108TA_32_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P108TA_32_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P108TA_32_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects))  %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 11  108TA Puck32: Area annotation
section: 12.5 Save normalized weights
text:
12.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P108TA_32_weights, "P108TA_32_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 11  108TA Puck32: Area annotation
section: 12.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
12.6 Add RCTD weights

P108TA_32_weights <- read.csv("P108TA_32_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P108TA_32_RNA <- AddMetaData(P108TA_32_RNA, P108TA_32_weights)

P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(mask_sum == 32 ~ "TLS1",
                          mask_sum == 30 ~ "TLS2",
                          mask_sum == 29 ~ "TLS3",
                          mask_sum %in% c(37, 35, 36, 33, 41)~ "Empty",
                          mask_sum %in% c(38, 25) ~ "Boundary",
                          mask_sum == 45 ~ "Tumor"))

text:
12.21 Straggling beads have the boundary label when they should be empty

# Find affected beads
SpatialDimPlot(P108TA_32_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data, plot_x < 1800 & plot_y < 1450), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = five_area_colors)

Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_empty <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_x < 1800 & plot_y < 1450) %>%
  filter(area == "Boundary") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

# Find affected beads
SpatialDimPlot(P108TA_32_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data, plot_x < 2900 & plot_y < 1000), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = five_area_colors)

Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads

  filter(plot_x < 2900 & plot_y < 1000) %>%
  filter(area == "Boundary") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

title: 12  108TB Puck06: Area annotation
section: 13.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
13.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P108TB_06_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P108TB_06_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P108TB_06_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 12  108TB Puck06: Area annotation
section: 13.5 Save normalized weights
text:
13.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P108TB_06_weights, "P108TB_06_normalized_weights.csv")

section: 13.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
13.6 Add RCTD weights

P108TB_06_weights <- read.csv("P108TB_06_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P108TB_06_RNA <- AddMetaData(P108TB_06_RNA, P108TB_06_weights)

P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 13  109T Puck14: Area annotation
section: 14.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
14.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P108TB_14_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P108TB_14_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P108TB_14_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Fibroblast" = "FIBRO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 13  109T Puck14: Area annotation
section: 14.5 Save normalized weights
text:
14.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P108TB_14_weights, "P108TB_14_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 13  109T Puck14: Area annotation
section: 14.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
14.6 Add RCTD weights

P108TB_14_weights <- read.csv("P108TB_14_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P108TB_14_RNA <- AddMetaData(P108TB_14_RNA, P108TB_14_weights)

P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Fibroblast = ifelse(is.na(Fibroblast), 0, Fibroblast),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

  geom_point(data = filter(P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data, plot_x < 700), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +

  filter(plot_x < 700) %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

title: 14  109T Puck23: Area annotation
section: 15.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
15.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P109TB_23_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P109TB_23_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P109TB_23_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 14  109T Puck23: Area annotation
section: 15.5 Save normalized weights
text:
15.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P109TB_23_weights, "P109TB_23_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 14  109T Puck23: Area annotation
section: 15.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
15.6 Add RCTD weights

P109TB_23_weights <- read.csv("P109TB_23_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P109TB_23_RNA <- AddMetaData(P109TB_23_RNA, P109TB_23_weights)

P109TB_23_RNA@meta.data <- P109TB_23_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 15  109T Puck34: Area annotation
section: 16.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
16.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P109TB_34_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P109TB_34_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P109TB_34_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 15  109T Puck34: Area annotation

text:

rctd_weights <- read.csv("P109TB_34_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P109TB_34_RNA <- AddMetaData(P109TB_34_RNA, rctd_weights)

P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data <- P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 16  110T Puck28: Area annotation
section: 17.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
17.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P110TA_28_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P110TA_28_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P110TA_28_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 16  110T Puck28: Area annotation
section: 17.5 Save normalized weights
text:
17.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P110TA_28_weights, "P110TA_28_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 16  110T Puck28: Area annotation
section: 17.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
17.6 Add RCTD weights

P110TA_28_weights <- read.csv("P110TA_28_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P110TA_28_RNA <- AddMetaData(P110TA_28_RNA, P110TA_28_weights)

P110TA_28_RNA@meta.data <- P110TA_28_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

# Extract straggling beads

  filter(plot_x > 3300 & plot_y < 550) %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P110TA_28_RNA@meta.data <- P110TA_28_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

title: 17  110T Puck30: Area annotation
section: 18.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
18.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P110TA_30_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P110TA_30_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P110TA_30_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 17  110T Puck30: Area annotation
section: 18.5 Save normalized weights
text:
18.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P110TA_30_weights, "P110TA_30_normalized_weights.csv")

section: 18.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
18.6 Add RCTD weights

P110TA_30_weights <- read.csv("P110TA_30_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P110TA_30_RNA <- AddMetaData(P110TA_30_RNA, P110TA_30_weights)

P110TA_30_RNA@meta.data <- P110TA_30_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 18  111T Puck32: Area annotation
section: 19.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
19.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P111TA_32_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P111TA_32_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P111TA_32_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 18  111T Puck32: Area annotation
section: 19.5 Save normalized weights
text:

write.csv(P111TA_32_weights, "P111TA_32_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 18  111T Puck32: Area annotation
section: 19.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
19.6 Add RCTD weights

P111TA_32_weights <- read.csv("P111TA_32_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P111TA_32_RNA <- AddMetaData(P111TA_32_RNA, P111TA_32_weights)

P111TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P111TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

title: 19  111T Puck37: Area annotation
section: 20.3 Open rctd objects
text:
20.3 Open rctd objects

P111TA_37_rctd <- readRDS("P111TA_37_rctd_results.rds")

title: 19  111T Puck37: Area annotation
section: 20.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights
text:
20.4 Remove reject beads and normalize RCTD weights

# Remove reject beads
rejects <- P111TA_37_rctd@results[["results_df"]] %>%
  filter(spot_class == "reject") %>%
  rownames()

P111TA_37_weights <- as.data.frame(normalize_weights(P111TA_37_rctd@results$weights)) %>%
  # Remove reject beads
  filter(!(rownames(.) %in% rejects)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Endothelial" = "ENDO",
                "Tumor" = "RCC",
                "Myeloid" = "MYELOID",
                "Tcell" = "T")

title: 19  111T Puck37: Area annotation
section: 20.5 Save normalized weights
text:
20.5 Save normalized weights

write.csv(P111TA_37_weights, "P111TA_37_normalized_weights.csv")

title: 19  111T Puck37: Area annotation
section: 20.6 Add RCTD weights
text:
20.6 Add RCTD weights

P111TA_37_weights <- read.csv("P111TA_37_normalized_weights.csv", row.names = 1)


P111TA_37_RNA <- AddMetaData(P111TA_37_RNA, P111TA_37_weights)

P111TA_37_RNA@meta.data <- P111TA_37_RNA@meta.data%>%
  mutate(B = ifelse(is.na(B), 0, B),
         Tcell = ifelse(is.na(Tcell), 0, Tcell),
         Endothelial = ifelse(is.na(Endothelial), 0, Endothelial),
         Myeloid = ifelse(is.na(Myeloid), 0, Myeloid),
         NK = ifelse(is.na(NK), 0, NK),
         Tumor = ifelse(is.na(Tumor), 0, Tumor))

text:
20.22 Straggling beads have the boundary label when they should be tumor

# Find boundary beads, change to tumor
SpatialDimPlot(P111TA_37_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0) +
  geom_point(data = filter(P111TA_37_RNA@meta.data, plot_y < 650 & plot_x < 2400), aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), size = 1, alpha = 0.05) +
  theme(legend.position = "None") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = two_area_colors)

Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.








# Extract straggling beads
beads_to_empty <- P111TA_37_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(plot_y < 650 & plot_x < 2400) %>%
  filter(area != "Empty") %>%
  pull(barcode)
# Cast to empty
P111TA_37_RNA@meta.data <- P111TA_37_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(barcode %in% beads_to_empty ~ "Empty",
                          !(barcode %in% beads_to_empty) ~ area))

title: 20  Create mask PNGs from ImageScope XML file: Area annotation
text:
21 Integrating RCTD calls and area annotations


22 Libraries

library(reticulate)
use_virtualenv("/home/cht269/my_envs/new_envs/R_anndata_py3.13.1/")



23 Packages

import os
from PIL import Image
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import cv2
import scanpy as sc
from scipy.sparse import csr_matrix



24 Steps to create data necessary for this script:

Save spatial plots as JPGs, ensuring the xy axis is set to 0,5000, and that coordinates are marked, by using + coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(0,5000), ylim = c(0,5000), expand = FALSE, clip = “off”)
Crop image so that the the boundaries of the plots are removed
Resize images to 5000 by 5000 pixels and save these images as jpgs
Load images into Imagescope
Draw areas
Save areas as xml files

7.Load jpgs, xml files, anndata objects into this script

Ensure a folder is at the path given by “generated png path”



25 Set paths

imagescope_xml_path = "../objects/area_annotation/xmls_040424"
imagescope_xml_file = "Puck30_110TA.xml"

adjusted_jpg_path = "../objects/area_annotation/adjusted_jpgs"
adjusted_jpg_file = "Puck30_110TA_empty.jpg"

generated_png_path = "../objects/area_annotation/area_png_masks"
puck_name = "Puck30_110TA"



26 Open object

crop=[0, 5000, 0, 5000] # set x and y limits of the image, needed to register coordinates and manual annotations



27 Open XML file from Imagescope and JPG of puck

tree = ET.parse(f'{imagescope_xml_path}/{imagescope_xml_file}')
root = tree.getroot()
slide = Image.open(f'{adjusted_jpg_path}/{adjusted_jpg_file}')
size = slide.size
print(size)



28 Save each region as its own 5k x 5k PNG file

for i,r in enumerate(root.iter('Region')):
    print(i,r)
    pts = []
    for p in r.iter('Vertex'):
        x = p.get('X')
        y = p.get('Y')
        pts.append([x, y])
        print(x,y)

    mask = np.ones((size[1], size[0]))*255

    cv2.fillPoly(mask, np.array([pts], 'int32'), 0)

    im=mask.astype(np.uint8)
    im = Image.fromarray(im)
    im.save(f'{generated_png_path}/{puck_name}/{puck_name}_region_{i}_mask.png')

title: 21  Myeloid boundary bead composition
text: 22 Show increased density of myeloid cells within the myeloid boundary compared to tumor using a linear mixed model

title: 21  Myeloid boundary bead composition
section: 23.1 Functions
text:
23.1 Functions

get_pct_myeloid_in_bin <- function(obj, bin_length = 30){
  md <- obj@meta.data %>%
    select(plot_x, plot_y, area, assignment1)
  
  # Create bins for x and y
  md$x_bin <- cut(md$plot_x, breaks = bin_length, labels = FALSE) 
  md$y_bin <- cut(md$plot_y, breaks = bin_length, labels = FALSE)
  
  # Don't consider empty areas
  md <- md %>%
    filter(area != "Empty")
  bin_df <- data.frame()

  for(i in c(1:bin_length)){
    for(j in c(1:bin_length)){
      bin <- md %>%
        filter(x_bin == i,
               y_bin == j)
      boundary_count <- bin %>%
        filter(area == "Boundary") %>%
        dplyr::count() %>%
        pull(n)
      tumor_count <- bin %>%
        filter(area == "Tumor") %>%
        dplyr::count() %>%
        pull(n)
      tls_count <- bin %>%
        filter(area %in% c("TLS1", "TLS2", "TLS3", "TLS4", "M2")) %>%
        dplyr::count() %>%
        pull(n)
      total_count <- bin %>%
        dplyr::count() %>%
        pull(n)
      myeloid_count <- bin %>%
        filter(assignment1 == "Myeloid") %>%
        dplyr::count() %>%
        pull(n)
      
      bin_summary <- c(i, j, total_count, boundary_count/total_count, tumor_count/total_count, tls_count/total_count, myeloid_count, myeloid_count/total_count)
      bin_df <- rbind(bin_df, bin_summary)
    }
  }
  colnames(bin_df) <- c("x_bin", "y_bin", "total_beads", "pct_boundary", "pct_tumor", "pct_tls", "ct_myeloid", "pct_myeloid")
  
  return(bin_df)
}

assign_bin_annotation <- function(bin_df){
  bin_df <- bin_df %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(pct_tls > 0.8 ~ "TLS",
                          pct_boundary > 0.8 ~ "Boundary",
                          pct_tumor > 0.8 ~ "Tumor",
                          total_beads == 0 ~ "Empty",
                          T ~ "Mix"))
  return(bin_df)
}

title: 21  Myeloid boundary bead composition
section: 32.1 Get permuted test statistic
text:
32.1 Get permuted test statistic

# Get permuted test statistic for each gene set
n_perm <- 1000

set.seed(123)

n_run <- 1
n_saved <- 1
non_conv <- 0

t_val_perm.vec <- c()
# Do 1000 converging loops
while(n_saved <= n_perm){
  # Print every saved 100 perms
  if (n_saved %% 100 == 0) { print(n_saved) }
  # Get the permuted replicate
  md_rep <- df_perm %>%
    filter(replicate == n_run)
  # Set runs as good
  bad_run <- FALSE
  # Attempt the model
  model <- withCallingHandlers(
    expr = {
      # Build linear model on permuted data
      lmer(pct_myeloid ~ perm_area + (1 | Patient / orig.ident), data = md_rep, REML = TRUE)},
    warning = function(w) {
    # Note if the model can't converge
    bad_run <<- TRUE
    non_conv <<- non_conv + 1
    n_run <<- n_run + 1
    print("Couldn't converge")
    invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )
      
  # Save the t val from the model if it has no errors
  if(!bad_run){
    # Get and save t val
    t_val_perm <- coef(summary(model))["perm_areaBoundary","t value"]
    t_val_perm.vec <- c(t_val_perm.vec, t_val_perm)
    # Count that we've saved a run
    n_saved <- n_saved + 1
    n_run <- n_run + 1
  } else {
    print("Skipping model")
  }
}
